name: Yogendra Koyelada
summary: I am a Business Intelligence Developer with 3.5 years of experience building actionable data solutions. I specialize in designing high-impact interactive dashboards in Power BI, writing optimized SQL databases, and developing sophisticated DAX measures that translate raw data into strategic business decisions.

career.title: SQL Developer

career.title: Power BI Developer
